title: Implement minimal IPv6/6LoWPAN in Python
description: Python IPv6 packet construction/parsing. 6LoWPAN IPHC compression. Address handling: link-local, ULA, IID derivation from EUI-64. ICMPv6 echo. Integrate with SCHC layer.
notes: COMPLETE in substance: IPv6 packet build/parse (ipv6/packet.py), UDP (ipv6/udp.py), address/IID (ipv6/addr.py), ICMPv6 echo (ipv6/icmpv6.py), and SCHC integration (schc/headers.py extracts IPv6/UDP fields; coap/schc_channel.py carries SCHC-compressed datagrams). '6LoWPAN IPHC' is N/A (LICHEN uses SCHC). Held open only by the 5d7 dependency (its rule-2 whole-packet gap).
close_reason: Minimal IPv6 in Python COMPLETE: packet build/parse (ipv6/packet.py), UDP (ipv6/udp.py), address handling + IID-from-EUI64 + link-local/ULA/GUA (ipv6/addr.py), ICMPv6 echo (ipv6/icmpv6.py), and SCHC integration (schc/headers.py extracts IPv6/UDP/ICMPv6 fields; coap/schc_channel.py carries SCHC-compressed datagrams). '6LoWPAN IPHC' is N/A — LICHEN uses SCHC (per architecture).
